name: UNO Flip!
description: UNO Flip! is Mattel's double-sided take on the family classic — every card has a friendly Light side and a venomous Dark side, and a special Flip card mid-play turns the entire deck (and discard pile) over to its harsher alter-ego. Light side plays like classic UNO; Dark side hits with Skip Everyone, Wild Draw Color, and a brutal Draw Five. Flip again to return to mercy.
